TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Lkuxan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 11 buwan, 18 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 72% kyan ku 13 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 28% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 61%, Paywan 6%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lkuxan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Lkuxan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Lkuxan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Lkuxan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lkuxan hya' ga Mklapay. tay 'llaw na Lkuxan hya' ga Pololan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč lkuxan …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu nańßuj …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, pajwan *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na lkuxan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na lkuxan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na lkuxan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na lkuxan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na lkuxan ńßja Ē …£a mklapaj. taj Ēllaw na lkuxan ńßja Ē …£a pololan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Lkuxan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 11 buwan, 18 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 72% kyan ku 13 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 28% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 61%, Paywan 6%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lkuxan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Lkuxan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Lkuxan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Lkuxan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lkuxan hya' ga Mklapay. tay 'llaw na Lkuxan hya' ga Pololan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč lkuxan …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu nańßuj …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, pajwan *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na lkuxan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na lkuxan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na lkuxan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na lkuxan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na lkuxan ńßja Ē …£a mklapaj. taj Ēllaw na lkuxan ńßja Ē …£a pololan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
